# New Jersey Data Privacy Act

Jurisdiction: United States - New Jersey
Region: US-NJ
Citation: New Jersey Data Privacy Act
Authority: New Jersey Legislature
Source URL: https://www.njleg.state.nj.us/bill-search/2022/S332
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, marketing_opt_out, accountability
Keywords: New Jersey Data Privacy Act, NJDPA, consumer privacy

## Summary
New Jersey comprehensive consumer privacy law with rights, opt-outs, sensitive-data controls, and controller obligations.

## Key compliance obligations
- Support consumer access, correction, deletion, portability, and opt-out rights.
- Provide privacy notice and appeals.
- Control sensitive data and targeted advertising.
